title: Introduction to Building Techniques
description: Learn advanced building techniques and styles

content.text:
Building Techniques

Good building techniques make your creations look better and more impressive.

Basic Principles:

  • Use different block types for variety
  • Add depth with stairs and slabs
  • Create patterns and textures
  • Use lighting for atmosphere

Building Styles:

  • Medieval - Stone, wood, and thatch
  • Modern - Clean lines, glass, and concrete
  • Fantasy - Magical and whimsical
  • Japanese - Traditional architecture

Advanced Techniques:

  • Use slabs for smooth surfaces
  • Create arches with stairs
  • Add details with fences and walls
  • Use different wood types for contrast

Tips for Better Builds:

  • Plan your build before starting
  • Start with a foundation
  • Add details gradually
  • Use reference images
content.task: Build a small house using different block types and add details like windows and a roof.
